sc.political.s: FEC: 2022-2024 cycle, 87% of Berkshire Hathaway PAC donations to Republicans ($2.3M of $2.6M).
sc.dei.s: No public record of named DEI programs or public commitments with funding amounts.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events on record; Scope 1+2 disclosure incomplete.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings; no major OSHA fatalities or class-action settlements documented.
sc.charity.s: Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation received $46B+ from Berkshire; transfers represent >20% of annual profits.
sc.animals.s: Financial services company; no animal-testing or animal-product supply chain documented.
sc.guns.s: Firearms are not a manufactured or retail product line for Berkshire Hathaway subsidiaries.
sc.privacy.s: Financial services; privacy governance subject to federal regulation; no major HIBP or FTC enforcement documented.
sc.execPay.s: Berkshire CEO Warren Buffett salary <$200K but holds ~14% equity; CEO-to-median-worker ratio >300:1 estimated.

charity.focus: Education, community development, hunger relief, diversity initiatives

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
